heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 455 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as the Congress may from time to time determine to be necessary to enable the Secretary to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 14 of , (classified to ) prior to the general amendment of act , by .act July 2, 1948, ch. 81162 Stat. 1228section 462 of this titlePub. L. 93–155July 2, 1948
